title: mowtsa' #4162
definition:
Moza = "fountain"

 1) son of Caleb by Ephah his concubine
 2) son of Zimri and a descendant of Saul
nasbUsage:
Definition: Moza = "fountain"

 1) son of Caleb by Ephah his concubine
 2) son of Zimri and a descendant of Saul

    NASB:  a son of Caleb, also a desc. of Saul
